MINI MINUTES:
No appearance by any party or counsel.

(Court-Certified Nepali Interpreter Anil Verma was present via Zoom and was excused by the judge pro tem.)

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF STONESTOWN SHOPPING CENTER, L.P.'S, Motion For Order Deeming Admitted Requests For Admission Against Defendant Hollywood Eyebrow, Inc.; Request For Sanctions In The Amount Of $574.

There being no appearances, the tentative ruling is adopted as follows:

Motion to deem admitted GRANTED. No timely opposition filed. Sanctions related to a motion under CCP 2033.280(c) are mandatory. Sanctions granted in the amount of $574, payable no later than September 29, 2023, unless otherwise agreed by the parties.

The prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order repeating verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling and must e-mail it to the Judge Pro Tem at: sborrowman@gmail.com.
